query:
CREATE TABLE `jobAssignments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`jobId` int NOT NULL,
	`crewMemberId` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `jobAssignments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `jobAssignments_jobId_jobs_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`jobId`) REFERENCES `jobs`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action,
	CONSTRAINT `jobAssignments_crewMemberId_crewMembers_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`crewMemberId`) REFERENCES `crewMembers`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action
)
